question: Which distribution centers ship the most items?
sql: SELECT dc.name AS distribution_center, COUNT(*) AS items_sold FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.inventory_items` ii JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.distribution_centers` dc ON dc.id = ii.product_distribution_center_id WHERE ii.sold_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dc.name ORDER BY items_sold DESC
analyst_notes: Item-to-DC mapping goes through inventory_items.product_distribution_center_id — the DC that stocked the unit. sold_at IS NOT NULL proxies shipped volume; there is no direct shipment-DC link in this schema, say it's a proxy.
author: claude-draft
